summary: Your Spring 2026 Pay Now buttons are ready. Delaney and Dutton each show $362.00 remaining ($724.00 total) after your recent $701.00 Stripe payment and sibling discount were applied.
How to pay: sign in at accounts.americanseekersacademy.com → Payments → Upcoming Payments → click Pay Now for each child and complete checkout with your card.
Your 2026 membership is already paid in full ($175.00) — no membership charge is due.
Winter enrollments for both children remain paid in full.
Spring session ends June 12. If you have any trouble with the Pay Now button, reply to this email.
